title: VDD confabulation: regex patterns compiled inside hot loop
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Dimension: Performance and Complexity. Location: src/vdd/confabulation.rs:110-123 (is_common_false_positive). Violation: The two regex patterns are compiled inside the function every call — and is_common_false_positive is called once per finding per iteration inside triage_findings. With 10 iterations and 20 findings per iteration, that is 400 regex compilations. regex::Regex::new is heavyweight (parsing, NFA construction). Additionally, the Regex is discarded if compilation fails with no log — silently treated as non-match. Mandated Refactor: Promote patterns to static LazyLock<Vec<Regex>> or use regex::RegexSet to match all patterns in one pass. Panic at startup if a pattern fails to compile (these are constants — compilation failure is a bug, not a runtime condition).
